// Access Protocol

DO NOT PITCH UNLESS YOU ARE RIGHT—BUT CURRENTLY ALONE.

This is not a contact form. It is a filter. If your idea is popular, you are not the target. If people are telling you it's impossible — proceed.

"Acknowledged. If there is resonance, you will hear from me."
© 2026 Guillaume Lauzier
